TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: = Luluna = Gaga mniq Nantowseyn Sinyisyang ka alang Luluna. 467 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 1,617 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 86% niqan 1,394 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 14% niqan 223 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Bunun83%, Tayal1%, Amis1%, Paiwan1%.
S.PHON: = luluna = gaga mniq nantowsən sinjisjaŋ ka alaŋ luluna. *** sapaħ ka knəəgu na sapaħ, *,*** ħiji ka kana knħbɾagan na ħiji. tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *,*** ħiji sp, ɾaħuq na uxaj tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *** ħiji koia. kana ka kləəgan səəɟiq ga, bunun**%, tajal*%, amis*%, paiwan*%.
S.FORM: = Luluna = Gaga mniq Nantowseyn Sinyisyang ka alang Luluna. 467 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 1,617 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 86% niqan 1,394 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 14% niqan 223 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Bunun83%, Tayal1%, Amis1%, Paiwan1%.
S.PHON: = luluna = gaga mniq nantowsən sinjisjaŋ ka alaŋ luluna. *** sapaħ ka knəəgu na sapaħ, *,*** ħiji ka kana knħbɾagan na ħiji. tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *,*** ħiji sp, ɾaħuq na uxaj tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *** ħiji koia. kana ka kləəgan səəɟiq ga, bunun**%, tajal*%, amis*%, paiwan*%.
